entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The target crop (Oryza sativa L.) for breeding and nutrition.

entities.name: BROWN PLANTHOPPER
entities.description: The pest (Nilaparvata lugens) that causes yield loss in rice.

entities.name: BPH RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of rice cultivars to resist infestation by the brown planthopper.

entities.name: SNP-BASED GENOTYPING
entities.description: High-throughput technology used to develop markers linked to BPH resistance.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A study undertaken to derive marker-trait associations between BPH damage scores and SNPs.

entities.name: BPH DAMAGE SCORES
entities.description: The metric used to assess the level of damage caused by brown planthopper.

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: The method used to obtain SNP data from MAGIC lines.

entities.name: MAGIC LINES
entities.description: Multi-parent advanced generation inter-cross lines used as the study population.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms used as markers for BPH resistance.

entities.name: GENERAL LINEAR MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to select significant SNPs involved in stress resistance pathways.

entities.name: FARMPCU MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to report SNPs in previous studies.

entities.name: STRESS RESISTANCE PATHWAYS
entities.description: Biological pathways involved in the plant's response to stress.

entities.name: KASP
entities.description: Kompetitive allele-specific PCR assays used to validate genotypes.

entities.name: SNPOS00912
entities.description: A specific SNP efficient in distinguishing BPH-resistant and susceptible clusters.

entities.name: SNPOS00915
entities.description: A specific SNP efficient in distinguishing BPH-resistant and susceptible clusters.

entities.name: SNPOS00922
entities.description: A specific SNP efficient in distinguishing BPH-resistant and susceptible clusters.

entities.name: SNPOS00923
entities.description: A specific SNP efficient in distinguishing BPH-resistant and susceptible clusters.

entities.name: SNPOS00927
entities.description: A specific SNP efficient in distinguishing BPH-resistant and susceptible clusters.

entities.name: SNPOS00929
entities.description: A specific SNP efficient in distinguishing BPH-resistant and susceptible clusters.

entities.name: BPH17
entities.description: A gene highly effective against biotype 4 of the brown planthopper.

entities.name: BPH32
entities.description: A gene highly effective against biotype 4 of the brown planthopper.

entities.name: BIOTYPE 4
entities.description: A specific biotype of the brown planthopper.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique used to transfer BPH resistance into popular varieties using diagnostic SNPs.
